title: Ultrasensitive Measurement of Both SARS-CoV-2 RNA and Antibodies from Saliva
author: Ter-Ovanesyan, Dmitry
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This is the accepted manuscript version of the work published in its final form as Ter-Ovanesyan, D., Gilboa, T., Lazarovits, R., Rosenthal, A., Yu, X., Li, J. Z., Church, G. M., & Walt, D. R. (2021). Ultrasensitive Measurement of Both SARS-CoV-2 RNA and Antibodies from Saliva.  Analytical Chemistry ,  93 (13), 5365-5370.  https://doi.org/10.1021/acs.analchem.1c00515
